boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: customer portability file released to verified account owner.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.

critical_features_preserved: account ownership and portability format approval match
final_answer: Source control record confirms ownership and format approval match exactly for this action. Boundary closed. Privacy operator may release customer portability file to verified account owner per current records. No defects remain open.
